accurate.why: All claims track the bill text or are accurate context (War Powers Resolution, cited statutes), with nothing contradicting the bill.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; statutory references and the War Powers Resolution context are correct.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: It correctly identifies the invoked statutes (sec. 1013 of the State Authorization Act and sec. 601(b) of the Arms Export Control Act) and the War Powers Resolution.

exceptions_conditions.why: It captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs (self-defense, intelligence sharing, assisting partners, evacuation) and the declaration-of-war/AUMF exception.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates or sunsets to report.

major_provisions_covered.why: It conveys the operative removal directive, findings, and exceptions without misrepresentation.

objective_tone.why: The summary neutrally relays findings and provisions without editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and internally consistent.

concise.why: It is appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Named statutes, the War Powers Resolution, and Operation Epic Fury are stated correctly per the bill.

correct_figures.why: Dates stated (Feb. 28, 2026; March 2, 2026) match the bill, and no figures are misstated.
